title: garryaceae
intro: The Garryaceae rank refers to a small family of flowering plants, commonly known as the silk-tassel bush family. This family is characterized by its unique flowers and shrub-like growth habit. The Garryaceae family is primarily found in the Pacific Northwest region of North America and contains approximately 10-15 species. It is a relatively rare and distinct family within the plant kingdom, with the most well-known genus being Garrya.
